title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: LINCOLN COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITY SERVICES COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals with intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services can include case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services for transportation, in-home supports or residential placement, and employment and vocational services. 255 SW Coast Highway Basement Level Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and US citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 265-0482 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 265-0482 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker to assist with the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, records of all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINCOLN COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITY SERVICES
